story: Dad left gun within reach of 3-year-old girl who shot and killed her 1-year-old sister, then asked her 'why she did that'
title: Tragic Accident Raises Questions
script: A three-year-old shot her sister. This tragedy highlights the devastating consequences of reckless gun ownership, as the father had left his handgun within reach of his child. The father's response, asking his daughter why she did that, is a haunting illustration of the senseless loss of life. Nearly two decades in prison is the price he will pay for his negligence, a stark reminder of the importance of gun safety. What will it take to prevent such tragedies from happening again in our communities?
